mahdev_company_contact.hours: Monday - Saturday: 9:00 AM - 8:00 PM (Sunday: Prior Booking Only)

mahdev_services_list.title: SWS Event Management
mahdev_services_list.description: Transforming spaces into breathtaking visual narratives. We specialize in luxury weddings, themed stages, church floral setups, and high-profile corporate galas.

mahdev_services_list.title: U1 Studio
mahdev_services_list.description: Capturing fleeting raw emotions and grand moments with cinematic precision. From high-altitude drone cinematography to intimate baby and studio portraits.

mahdev_services_list.title: Mahdev ERP System
mahdev_services_list.description: Robust, custom-engineered ERP ecosystems designed to centralize and automate payroll, POS, school records, live multi-warehouse inventories, and accounting.

mahdev_services_list.title: Mahdev IT Solutions
mahdev_services_list.description: End-to-end fullstack development, intuitive UI/UX design, cloud native solutions, secure managed hosting, and proactive cybersecurity monitoring.

mahdev_services_list.title: Mahdev Travels
mahdev_services_list.description: Elite passenger vans, premier wedding car rental, and comprehensive vacation packages across Sri Lanka with professional English chauffeurs.

mahdev_decoration_categories.title: Wedding Decorations
mahdev_decoration_categories.description: Magical, royal, and luxury stages, entry walkways, and floral canopies tailored to your exact wedding theme.

mahdev_decoration_categories.title: Birthday Decorations
mahdev_decoration_categories.description: Whimsical balloon arches, vibrant theme backdrops, and immersive fairytale-style children birthday setups.

mahdev_decoration_categories.title: Church Decorations
mahdev_decoration_categories.description: Solemn, elegant, and serene floral arrangements, pew linings, and altar backdrops for holy unions and festivals.

mahdev_decoration_categories.title: Corporate Events
mahdev_decoration_categories.description: Sleek, minimalist branding elements, keynote stages, panel panels, and VIP lounge styling with professional floral pairings.

mahdev_decoration_categories.title: Stage Decoration
mahdev_decoration_categories.description: Immersive LED backdrop integrations, dynamic projection mapping frames, and high-impact physical set constructions.

mahdev_decoration_categories.title: Flower Decoration
mahdev_decoration_categories.description: Bespoke exotic and traditional floral layouts using hand-picked marigolds, premium orchids, and imported red roses.

mahdev_decoration_categories.title: Indoor Decoration
mahdev_decoration_categories.description: Cosy banquets, intimate lighting design, dynamic ceiling hangings, and ambient photo booths for indoor setups.

mahdev_decoration_categories.title: Outdoor Decoration
mahdev_decoration_categories.description: Bohemian canopy lights, garden hangings, grand rustic lawn arches, and weather-resilient evening lounge setups.

mahdev_rental_items.name: Luxury Banquet Gold Chiavari Chair
mahdev_rental_items.description: Elegant gold-finished titanium metal Chiavari chairs, complete with standard white soft cushion padding.

mahdev_rental_items.name: Rustic Hexagonal Wooden Arch
mahdev_rental_items.description: Sturdy, modular solid mahogany hex arch frame. Ideal for outdoor floral anchors and custom lighting trails.

mahdev_rental_items.name: Warm LED Bulbs String Lights (50m)
mahdev_rental_items.description: Heavy-duty commercial outdoor string lights styled with warm, vintage incandescent filament bulbs.

mahdev_rental_items.name: Polished Brass Traditional 6ft Oil Lamp
mahdev_rental_items.description: Grand 6-feet polished brass standing lamp, custom engraved. Essential for traditional Sri Lankan lighting ceremonies.

mahdev_rental_items.name: Exotic Silver 5-Arm Candelabra
mahdev_rental_items.description: Stately five-arm polished silver table centerpieces to create high-end premium lighting levels.

mahdev_rental_items.name: High-Definition P2.5 LED Screen (12ft x 8ft)
mahdev_rental_items.description: Ultra HD high-brightness P2.5 LED modular wall backdrop with professional video switcher control rack.

mahdev_erp_modules.title: Omnichannel POS System
mahdev_erp_modules.description: Blazing-fast billing terminal running offline-first, syncs in milliseconds once online. Custom optimized for retail and quick-service food chains.

mahdev_erp_modules.title: Smart Multi-Warehouse Inventory
mahdev_erp_modules.description: Real-time stock movement, custom safety threshold alerts, auto reordering algorithms, and barcode/QR catalog management.

mahdev_erp_modules.title: Double-Entry Accounting
mahdev_erp_modules.description: Automated ledger posting from POS and purchase slips. Comprehensive balance sheets, P&L statements, and automated GST/TDS tax summaries.

mahdev_erp_modules.title: HR, Payroll & Attendance
mahdev_erp_modules.description: Unified employee records, biometric scanner API connections, cloud shifts scheduler, salary slips generator with complex tax slab components.

mahdev_erp_modules.title: Industry Specialized Modules
mahdev_erp_modules.description: Tailored workflow platforms for specialized domains like schools, hospitals, fine-dine restaurants, and active retail networks.

mahdev_it_projects.title: Vastra Luxury Silk Store
mahdev_it_projects.description: A luxurious custom-tailored apparel shop featuring dynamic color-swatch customizer, high-contrast visual zoom, and multi-currency checkout gateways.

mahdev_it_projects.title: Apex Global Logistics
mahdev_it_projects.description: Real-time fleet tracker connecting over 500+ active trucks. Features reactive interactive maps, dynamic route optimizations, and automated fuel consumption logs.

mahdev_it_projects.title: Oakwood International School
mahdev_it_projects.description: Comprehensive student/parent community hub featuring live attendance tracking, interactive fee transaction records, and an online exam portal.

mahdev_it_projects.title: HealPath Clinics Hub
mahdev_it_projects.description: A cloud clinic management web platform hosting patient electronic records, appointment calendar logs, automated SMS prescriptions, and billing audits.

mahdev_testimonials.name: Rajesh Singhania
mahdev_testimonials.comment: Mahdev Pvt Ltd decorated our daughter’s wedding in Colombo and it looked like a literal palace! The marigold arches and fairy lighting was absolutely breathtaking. Simultaneously, we automated our retail store billing with their POS ERP system. Outstanding multi-skilled team!

mahdev_testimonials.name: Dr. Anjali Mehta
mahdev_testimonials.comment: We hired them for website development and UI/UX design. They built an exceptionally responsive client portal. We were so impressed that we integrated their clinic attendance module. Truly professional and reliable.

mahdev_testimonials.name: Karan Malhotra
mahdev_testimonials.comment: Their Restaurant POS and payroll system saved us over 40 hours of manual bookkeeping each month. We also contracted their photography wing for our culinary shoot. The cinematic lighting is award-winning!

mahdev_leadership_team.name: Yuvanshan Prabakaran
mahdev_leadership_team.bio: Directing overall corporate strategy and technical execution at Mahdev Pvt Ltd. Yuvanshan drives high-performance cloud databases, enterprise infrastructure, and division alignment.

mahdev_leadership_team.name: Divaincy Fernando
mahdev_leadership_team.bio: Spearheading business operations, design excellence, and event management logistics. Divaincy oversees creative styling pipelines and client success partnerships.

mahdev_theme_settings.heroDescription: Mahdev Pvt Ltd is a multi-service company providing decoration services, photography, ERP software solutions, and IT services.

itinerary.title: Arrival & Sigiriya Journey
itinerary.desc: Airport greeting and scenic transport to Sigiriya. Relax in custom eco-luxury lodges.

itinerary.title: Sigiriya Rock Fortress & Dambulla
itinerary.desc: Morning hike up the Sigiriya Lion Rock Citadel. Evening tour of the ancient golden Dambulla caves.

itinerary.title: Sacred Kandy Exploration
itinerary.desc: Travel to Kandy via spice gardens. Visit the Temple of the Sacred Tooth Relic and catch Kandyan live drums.

itinerary.title: Royal Botanical Gardens
itinerary.desc: Walk through Peradeniya Royal Botanic wonders and complete Colombo shopping excursions.

itinerary.title: Airport Departure
itinerary.desc: Chauffeur transport to airport with souvenir gift pack from Mahdev team.

itinerary.title: Kandy to Nuwara Eliya Alpine Drive
itinerary.desc: Scenic mountain climb to Nuwara Eliya. Inspect colonial estates and Ramboda cascading waterfall.

itinerary.title: Scenic Tea Estates & Train Ride
itinerary.desc: Live organic tea leaves harvesting demonstration. Scenic high-altitude mountain railway journey to Ella.

itinerary.title: Ella Rock Trek & Nine Arches
itinerary.desc: Hike to Ella Rock summit. Walk on the world-famous stone Nine Arch railway bridge.

itinerary.title: Ravana Falls & Airport Return
itinerary.desc: Admire Ravana waterfall legends and return safely through the rolling southern plains.

itinerary.title: Arrival & Beach Check-in
itinerary.desc: Direct luxury express drive to Hikkaduwa/Galle beach resorts.

itinerary.title: Unesco Galle Fort Discovery
itinerary.desc: Explore cobblestone alleys, Dutch ramparts, lighthouses, and authentic handloom stores.

itinerary.title: Whale Watching & Turtle Hatcheries
itinerary.desc: Early morning oceanic yacht cruise to spot Blue Whales. Evening sea turtle release program.

itinerary.title: Deep Yala Wildlife Safari
itinerary.desc: Full-day open-roof 4x4 safari looking for Sri Lankan leopards, wild elephants, and peacocks.

itinerary.title: Water Sports in Bentota
itinerary.desc: Thrilling jet-ski, banana-boat, and river safaris down Madu Ganga.

itinerary.title: Farewell Coastal Tour
itinerary.desc: Coastal train commute and comfortable airport drop.
